subcodes.first_line: O dear friend! Your letter arrived and from its contents joy was attained. In Port Said you fell ill [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دوست عزیز نامه شما رسید از مضمون خوشنودی حاصل گردید در پورتسعید ناخوش شدید
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @travels to Egypt by Abdu'l-Baha, @review of publications, @business; financial; property matters
